title: Activity Logs Event Type Query Param
excerpt:
Right now, you can filter the Activity Logs query by column_ids, item_ids, group_ids, and Date Ranges (by proxy board_ids, too.) However, I’d love to be able to query for the event type, too. 
The Activity Logs query can…

posts.author: owreese (Owein Reese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Right now, you can filter the Activity Logs query by column_ids, item_ids, group_ids, and Date Ranges (by proxy board_ids, too.) However, I’d love to be able to query for the event type, too.

The Activity Logs query can grow quite large on a board with 500+ Items even if you’re only looking at a single column_id. Setting the limit to just the event type would help quite a bit to cut down wait times.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @owreese and welcome to the community!

Thank you for your request!
